title: SCHC whole-packet rules 0/1/3/4 + packet<->field extraction
description: 2le delivered the SCHC rule model, registry, SchcContext selection, and concrete rules (CoAP, UDP ports, ICMPv6 Echo=rule 2). Still needed for full spec appendix A.1 coverage: (1) Rules 0/1 (link-local & global IPv6+UDP+CoAP) and 3/4 (RPL DIO/DAO) as field descriptors. BLOCKER: spec appendix A.1 only gives compressed SIZES and the CoAP field table (A.2); IPv6 address compression (IID elision via L2 context vs MSB/LSB) is not specified — needs a design decision. (2) A packet<->field-dict extraction layer mapping IPv6Packet/UDP/CoAP/ICMPv6/RPL objects to the flat {field_id: int} dicts the codec consumes. Without it rules 0/1 can't be exercised on real packets. This is the integration glue 8bm/5xf/e2m ultimately need.
notes: DONE this increment: packet<->field extraction FRAMEWORK (schc/headers.py: PacketProfile, compress_packet/decompress_packet with rule-255 fallback, residue_bit_length/byte_length helpers) + UDP-over-IPv6 codec (ipv6/udp.py) + RULE 0 (link-local IPv6+UDP+CoAP, schc/rules.py LINK_LOCAL_COAP_RULE). End-to-end: real aiocoap-encoded CoAP packet compresses (52 header bytes -> 1+25 residue, CoAP token/options/payload as verbatim tail) and decompresses to EXACT original bytes (lengths/checksums recomputed). 12 new tests. Address note: link-local /64 prefix elided, 64-bit IID carried (full L2-IID elision needs the crypto-gated link layer). REMAINING: rule 1 (global IPv6+UDP+CoAP, like rule 0 w/ global prefix), rule 3 (RPL DIO) and rule 4 (RPL DAO) as additional profiles on the same framework.
close_reason: Complete: extraction framework (schc/headers.py PacketProfile + compress_packet/decompress_packet + rule-255 fallback), UDP codec (ipv6/udp.py), and all four whole-packet rules — rule 0 (link-local CoAP), rule 1 (global CoAP), rule 3 (RPL DIO), rule 4 (RPL DAO w/ DODAGID), built from shared field helpers in schc/rules.py. SchcChannel wires SCHC into the CoAP transport. Each rule round-trips real packets (aiocoap CoAP, rpl DIO/DAO via the rpl codecs) to exact bytes incl. variable tails (CoAP token/options, RPL options); lengths/checksums recomputed. ~28 tests. Documented: prefix/IID context elision deferred to the (crypto-gated) link layer, so sizes exceed spec A.1's L2-elided figures but are correct.
